draft_preferences.ask_for_clarification_template: Thanks for the message. I want to make sure I respond accurately. Could you clarify [insert missing detail]?
draft_preferences.scheduling_template: Thanks for reaching out. I am available [insert availability]. Please let me know what time works best for you.
draft_preferences.deadline_template: Thanks for the reminder. I saw the deadline and will take care of it by [insert time].
draft_preferences.generic_template: Thanks for the message. I reviewed it and will follow up shortly.
